formats.notes: Native GIF frame extraction handles bounded frames and generated disposal background/previous tests.
Native WebP frame route is wired; animated WebP correctness requires external corpus samples.
Native JPEG honors EXIF orientation. JPEGs with ICC/Adobe markers require system color-managed decode before fallback.
Native static decode and APNG metadata; APNG animated playback is not native.
Native static decode includes 16-bit luma corpus.
System/WIC required; Rust fallback is skipped.
System/WIC required; Rust fallback is skipped.
System/WIC required when a JPEG XL codec is installed; Rust fallback is skipped.
